macro.title: Mortgage rates move higher, but cooling inflation should provide relief
macro.what: Fears that mortgage rates were going to soar past 7% may have been assuaged Tuesday when Consumer Price Index (CPI) data for June showed cooling inflation.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Dream Finders names former Lennar co-CEO Rick Beckwitt as board co-chair
macro.what: Dream Finders announced that Rick Beckwitt as co-chairman of its board of directors
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: July rate hike should be off the table with big June inflation miss
macro.what: June CPI declined 0.4% and ran 3.5% year over year, and flat monthly inflation weakens the argument for a July hike.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates to Fall as Cooler-Than-Expected Inflation Report Lowers Odds of a July Fed Rate Hike
macro.what: Takeaway: Rates will fall today after an unexpectedly soft CPI inflation reading that will keep the Fed from hiking at the July 29th meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: U.S. Pending Home Sales Rise to Highest Level in 6 Weeks
macro.what: Pending home sales ticked up as housing payments temporarily dipped down
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Taylor Morrison appoints Jeremy Hampson as Jacksonville division president
housing.what: Taylor Morrison named industry veteran Jeremy Hampson as president of its Jacksonville division as the builder expands its Esplanade brand.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Big banks crush Q2 mortgage origination expectations
housing.what: Big banks exceeded analysts' expectations for mortgage origination volume in the second quarter of 2026, posting an average increase of 32% compared to the prior three-month period
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: MBA reports June decline in mortgage credit availability
housing.what: MBA’s MCAI fell 2% to a reading of 105.8 in June, led by a 4.6% drop in government programs, while conventional dipped 0.1%.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Home Sellers Outnumber Buyers 2 to 1 in Miami, Nashville, and Much of Texas, The Nation’s Strongest Buyer’s Markets
housing.what: There were almost half a million more home sellers than buyers in the U.S
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Jim Dalrymple Joins Rocket as Principal of Industry Relations
housing.what: Rocket has hired Jim Dalrymple as principal of industry relations, a role focused on building relationships with MLSs, trade associations, brokerage leaders and technology partners across the housing industry
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: U.S. Home Prices Hit All-Time High, Driven in Part By Big Upticks in San Francisco and West Palm Beach
housing.what: Prices rose 2.2% year over year in June to a record high, mainly because of growing demand
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: OpenAI, Anthropic Employees Could Buy Nearly One-Third of All Homes in San Francisco With IPO Earnings
housing.what: A new Redfin analysis takes a look at how much Bay Area real estate OpenAI and Anthropic employees could hypothetically purchase with their IPO earnings, in the wake of two massively valuable AI companies filing confidentially to go public
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: EquityProtect report shows expanding deed theft protections, room for improvement
notables.what: EquityProtect said 29 states do not have specific deed theft laws, pointing property owners to broader fraud and forgery statutes.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Real Brokerage REMAX merger clears antitrust hurdle
notables.what: REMAX said the DOJ ended the HSR waiting period early for its merger with Real, with votes scheduled for 08/14.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Single-family investor restrictions take effect under ROAD Act
notables.what: New law bars institutional investors with 350 or more homes from buying additional single-family homes, with carve-outs for BTR.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Baird and Warner names Jeanette Cutler chief marketing officer
notables.what: Baird and Warner appointed Jeanette Cutler CMO, overseeing brand, communications and growth for 2,700 agents in 30 offices.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
